title: planchonella albida
intro: Planchonella albida, also known as the white plum or white sapote, is a species of fruit-bearing tree native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The fruit of the Planchonella albida plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
